# BUS311 chapter rebuild brief

Complete this brief before rebuilding a new Canva, PowerPoint, PDF, or legacy chapter deck. The approved defaults in `docs/bus311-html-deck-standard.md` apply unless this brief states an exception.

## Lesson identity

- **Lesson ID:**
- **Track / module / lesson:**
- **Chapter or topic:**
- **Course-map title:**
- **Course outcomes:**
- **Class period:** 75 minutes unless otherwise specified
- **Mode:** Presenter
- **Speaker notes:** Yes

## Source material

- **Canva link or design ID:**
- **PPTX/PDF path:**
- **Source title:**
- **Source slide count:**
- **Slide range:** All unless otherwise specified
- **Original source remains read-only:** Yes

## Target

- **Maintained content module:** `scripts/decks/bus311-<track>-m##-l##-content.mjs`
- **Builder:** `scripts/build-bus311-<track>-m##-l##.mjs`
- **Output:** `<TRACK>/M##/bus311-<track>-m##-l##-slides.html`
- **Source inventory:** `audits/bus311-<track>-m##-l##-source-inventory.md`
- **Review log:** `audits/bus311-<track>-m##-l##-review-log.md`

## Term and schedule

- **Target term:**
- **Dates or milestones that must change:**
- **Governing syllabus/calendar/Canvas source:**
- **Term-specific details that should not enter reusable chapter content:**

## Content requirements

- **Concepts and sequence that must be preserved:**
- **Examples and numbers that must be preserved:**
- **Assignment requirements that must be preserved:**
- **New examples, companies, or current events to add:**
- **Content to remove:**
- **Content to split or combine:**
- **Terminology corrections:**
- **Known factual or sourcing questions:**

## Graphical plan

- **Slides that should remain image-led:**
- **Images approved for local use:**
- **Charts/tables to rebuild as HTML or SVG:**
- **Processes, timelines, or diagrams to rebuild:**
- **Dense slides that need to split:**
- **Places where a visual break would help:**

## Numerical teaching thread

- **Scenario:**
- **Input values:**
- **Formula or financial logic:**
- **Calculation slides:**
- **Interpretation or decision students should make:**
- **Numbers that must remain consistent across slides:**

## Classroom activity

- **Partner/group instruction:**
- **Student task:**
- **Time allowance:**
- **Answer/reveal slide needed:**
- **Any content that belongs only in the private teaching key:**

## Privacy and rights review

- **Personal/student information present in source:**
- **Publisher or licensed material present:**
- **Proprietary FactSet content present:**
- **Logos requiring rights verification:**
- **Assets approved for the public repository:**
- **Items that must remain private or be omitted:**

## Approval gates

- [ ] Every source slide inventoried
- [ ] First graphical HTML rebuild complete
- [ ] Numerical examples verified
- [ ] Assets and rights reviewed
- [ ] Instructor browser review complete
- [ ] Review comments classified and resolved
- [ ] Deck validator passes
- [ ] Public validator passes
- [ ] Browser overflow/navigation/console QA passes
- [ ] Instructor approval recorded
- [ ] Course map and generated homepage updated if appropriate
